title: Spiced! - [Farmer's Delight Add-on]
description: Spice Up Your Plain Diet by Adding Spices!
body:
REQUIRES FARMER'S DELIGHT




Join Discord For Updates And Suggestions! - https://discord.com/invite/4ebsS4R2hN

 unique enough to decorate your garden, and have various effects when added to food.
Currently, there are three types of herbs: Rosemary (Speed), Lantana (Fire Resistance), and Lavender (Resistance).

Each flora can be found in a different biome, 
and you can obtain spices by sprinkling bone meal on the plants or harvesting them yourself to craft them.
Also, herbs are flowers, so you can breed them with bees and have them collect honey, or place them on the crafting table to make dye.

Have Fun!

I am using a translator ;--;
